violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in walk in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape on walk in cooler door. duct tape is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed heavy powder build up in chutes of dispenser.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed boxes of single service items on floor in storage area.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed food in hand sink upon arrival.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
